title: cleistanthus schlechteri var. schlechteri
intro: Cleistanthus schlechteri var. schlechteri, also known as African spurge, is a plant species that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of diterpenoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Cleistanthus schlechteri var. schlechteri include the treatment of wounds, skin infections, and fever, as well as its use as an anti-arthritic agent. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve the use of its leaves and stems, which can be dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
